titleStmt.title: SII 42.1: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 1. (A.R. No. B. 1 of 1953-54.) Achyutāpuram, Tadipatri Taluk, Anantapur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone in a field.
The record is dated Pārthiva, chaitra, śu. 11, va (Saturday) and in characters of 15th century A.D.

Registers a grant of some land to [Saṅkīrttana] Timmaya, son of Abarāju, by Chinnapareḍḍi-Akkali-reḍḍi-Kas[i*]vi-reḍḍi of Chilumakūru for the merit of Mahānaṇḍaḷēśvara Saṁbeṭa Tirumalayyadēva-mahārāja who is endowed with the titles Maṁnya-Gajapati and Aṁtyaṁbaragaṇḍa. The donee seems to have been associated with the Yōgānanda Nārasiṁha temple and other Vaishṇava shrines which seem to have received different plots of land at Mōṭrugaḍa. It refers to some Kānikas, the payment of which might have been exempted to the villagers. The inscription was written by Sūgūri Tiṁmana.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of Conch(?), tirunāmaṁ and discus(?).

pā¨rtti(¨rtthi)va saṁvatsara cai
tra śu 11 va śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁ
ḍalēsva(śva)ra Āṁ(Aṁ)tyaṁbaragaṁḍa
ma(ṁ)nyagajapati saṁbeṭa tiru
malayyadēva mahārājula
ku pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁgānu Abarāju
koḍuku saṁkī¨rttana tiṁmaya
gāriki cilumakūri ciṁnapa
reḍḍi Akkalireḍḍi ksa(ce)vireḍḍigāru
yiccina dha¨rmasā(śā)sanaṁ yōgā
naṁdanārasiṁhyadēvara moda
laina viṣṇusthānālu 5 kini pū
[¨rvā]na cellē varimaḍi māmitā (?)
nu É2 pātāḷagaṁga sthaḷaṁ
kha 1 . gannu mōṭrugaḍa cellē cēnu
kha 0 . nu yēṁṭā māku cellē rā
nisi māmiḷḷuṁnnu celliṁcē
di nagari nū
Figures of Sun and Crescent moon; below are engraved a Kalaśa(?), flanked by temples(?)

luru gīḷu kānikalu
konaṁ celladu yi
ṁduku ya(E)vvarainānu
vakraṁ talaci
gōvuṁnnu
navāru
lines are wornout
To the right of the second face, there is an inscription with the depiction of a tree.

dēvasthānālaku
lōnu yidi ma
riyyāda vrā
sina sūgū
ri tiṁ
mana vrāta
lu
Digital edition of SII 42.1 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
